_info.description: Official citizenship application status registry — The Legend of Legiona

instructions.thelol_id: Set this ONLY when status is 'approved' AND you have issued the ID in the NIS admin console. Format: THELOL-YYYY-#####. Leave empty string '' if not yet issued. When set, the status page will display the NIS ID block with links to the ID card and registry.
instructions.public_note: CITIZEN-VISIBLE — shown on the status page. Use for official messages to the applicant. Leave empty string if no message needed.
instructions.admin_note: ADMIN-ONLY — NEVER rendered on the status page. Use for internal tracking, reasons, flags. Safe to write candidly.
instructions.workflow: 1. Get Formspree email. 2. Add entry below with status pending. 3. Review applicant. 4. Update status. 5. If approved, go to NIS admin and issue ID. 6. Add thelol_id here. 7. Commit to GitHub. 8. Done — live within minutes.

applications.admin_note: Verified active on server. Clean record. Approved. ID issued.

applications.public_note: Your citizenship has been approved. Your National ID will be issued shortly by The Black House.
applications.admin_note: Approved. Need to issue NIS ID — pending admin session.

applications.public_note: Your application did not meet the eligibility requirements for the current era.
applications.admin_note: Known hostile history. Banned from reapplying this era.
